concept: Design an exciting world where the player controls a character who can manipulate time but only within small localized bubbles. These time bubbles can accelerate, slow, or reverse time for specific objects or enemies but never affect the player directly. As the adventure progresses, increasingly complex scenarios require precise placement of multiple time bubbles simultaneously. The protagonist is racing to prevent paradoxes from tearing apart the fabric of reality as a rogue scientist meddles with the timestream. Success depends on mastering the escalating complexity of time manipulation mechanics while managing the limited energy available for creating time bubbles.
